title: Uno strano tipo
actors: Adriano Celentano, Claudia Mori, Donatella Turri
plot: Peppino, a slow-witted local villager of the Italian resort town of Amalfi, is bribed to impersonate famed rock and roll star Adriano Celentano for autographs and personal appearances. While Celentano tries to romance Emanuela Maz...
